title: Create: To Infinity and Beyond!
description: A modpack centering around Create and Ad Astra, with Mekanism and AE2.
body: This modpack answers the question: What if I could take Create components into space? Using Create, Ad Astra, Mekanism, AE2, and wayyy too many Create addons, "Create: To Infinity and Beyond!" strives to provide a balanced experience with a little bit of something for everyone.
